'''鈭歳-sh-v''' ('''karashav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knacker|knacker]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knacker|knacker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-sh-v
|-
! Lemma
| karashav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirashav|thirashav]] || [[word:jirashav|jirashav]] || [[word:shirashav|shirashav]] || [[word:kirashav|kirashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurashav|thuthurashav]] || [[word:jujurashav|jujurashav]] || [[word:shushurashav|shushurashav]] || [[word:kukurashav|kukurashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurashav|thurashav]] || [[word:jurashav|jurashav]] || [[word:shurashav|shurashav]] || [[word:kurashav|kurashav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurashav|thurashav]] || [[word:jurashav|jurashav]] || [[word:shurashav|shurashav]] || [[word:kurashav|kurashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therashav|therashav]] || [[word:jerashav|jerashav]] || [[word:sherashav|sherashav]] || [[word:kerashav|kerashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorashav|thothorashav]] || [[word:jojorashav|jojorashav]] || [[word:shoshorashav|shoshorashav]] || [[word:kokorashav|kokorashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorashav|thorashav]] || [[word:jorashav|jorashav]] || [[word:shorashav|shorashav]] || [[word:korashav|korashav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorashav|thorashav]] || [[word:jorashav|jorashav]] || [[word:shorashav|shorashav]] || [[word:korashav|korashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rashav|th忙rashav]] || [[word:j忙rashav|j忙rashav]] || [[word:sh忙rashav|sh忙rashav]] || [[word:k忙rashav|k忙rashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharashav|thatharashav]] || [[word:jajarashav|jajarashav]] || [[word:shasharashav|shasharashav]] || [[word:kakarashav|kakarashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharashav|tharashav]] || [[word:jarashav|jarashav]] || [[word:sharashav|sharashav]] || [[word:karashav|karashav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharashav|tharashav]] || [[word:jarashav|jarashav]] || [[word:sharashav|sharashav]] || [[word:karashav|karashav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharashav|sharashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharashav|gosharashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharashav|gokisharashav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharashavn眉|sharashavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharashavnkn眉|gosharashavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashavn眉|gokisharashavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharashavsh毛|sharashavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharashavnksh毛|gosharashavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharashavsh毛|gokisharashavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashavro|sharashavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashavnkro|gosharashavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashavro|gokisharashavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashavmu|sharashavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashavnkmu|gosharashavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashavmu|gokisharashavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharashavsher|sharashavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharashavnksher|gosharashavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharashavsher|gokisharashavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharashavng|sharashavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharashavnkng|gosharashavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharashavng|gokisharashavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharashavya|sharashavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharashavnkya|gosharashavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharashavya|gokisharashavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharashavyam|sharashavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharashavnkyam|gosharashavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharashavyam|gokisharashavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashavn眉sh毛|sharashavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashavnkn眉sh毛|gosharashavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashavn眉sh毛|gokisharashavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashavn眉ro|sharashavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashavnkn眉ro|gosharashavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashavn眉ro|gokisharashavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashavn眉mu|sharashavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashavnkn眉mu|gosharashavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashavn眉mu|gokisharashavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashavsh毛n眉|sharashavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashavnksh毛n眉|gosharashavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashavsh毛n眉|gokisharashavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashavsh毛ro|sharashavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashavnksh毛ro|gosharashavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashavsh毛ro|gokisharashavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashavsh毛mu|sharashavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashavnksh毛mu|gosharashavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashavsh毛mu|gokisharashavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashavron眉|sharashavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashavnkron眉|gosharashavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashavron眉|gokisharashavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashavrosh毛|sharashavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashavnkrosh毛|gosharashavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashavrosh毛|gokisharashavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashavromu|sharashavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashavnkromu|gosharashavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashavromu|gokisharashavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashavmun眉|sharashavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashavnkmun眉|gosharashavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashavmun眉|gokisharashavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashavmush毛|sharashavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashavnkmush毛|gosharashavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashavmush毛|gokisharashavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashavmuro|sharashavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashavnkmuro|gosharashavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashavmuro|gokisharashavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
